title: Border Gods
description: Anything for an inch of blocks
body:
Sacrifice items for the border to increase. This is a server mod! Meaning vanilla clients can connect just fine without it ;).

I am making this on my offtime for my personal server. So it will take time for the real stuff to come out, currently only does:

- Configurable border increase schedule
- Configurable border increase size
- Configurable gods
- 3 different Gods

I plan to add
- Multiblock shrines and deeper mechanics
